title: Cre8-Bit
description: 8x8 Texture Pack for the Create Mod. Intended to be used with F8thful or similar texture packs.
body:
![A conveyer belt leading to an arm that sorts item into 5 different chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9e923bab766a0ee08ae85e8605cd191093fdc69.png)
# What is This?
The goal of this texture pack is to go with the [F8thful](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/f8thful) or similar texture pack. It only changes the [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) textures to 8x8 instead of 16x16.

I find that this pack looks the best when using shaders and some depth of feild, but if can also be used without shaders if your into the even more pixelated look.

I gone through most of the blocks and made sure that they work well with the models and other non standard behaviors of the Create Mod, but it's not perfect, so let me know of issues by adding them to the git.
